item.title: Bobcat 7338638 Hydraulic Cylinder (Aftermarket)
item.description:
High-performance aftermarket hydraulic cylinder for Bobcat equipment. This precision-engineered replacement component is designed to meet or exceed OEM standards, providing reliable lifting and tilting power for your Bobcat loaders and excavators.
Key Features: • Direct OEM replacement for Bobcat part number 7338638 • Heavy-duty chrome-plated rod for superior corrosion resistance and long seal life • Precision-honed tubing for smooth operation and maximum power efficiency • High-pressure seals designed for demanding industrial and construction applications • Rigorously tested for leaks and performance under load • Fast 1-2 day delivery available in the continental USA
Restore your machine's hydraulic performance with this durable, cost-effective replacement cylinder.
Replaces OEM Part Number: 7338638

item.title: Bobcat T650 Rubber Track 450x84x53 Block Tread
item.description:
Replacement rubber track for the Bobcat T650 compact track loader in the 84mm-pitch interchange configuration — 450mm wide, 84mm pitch, 53 links. The staggered block tread runs smoother on hard surfaces and pavement, making it a favorite for concrete crews and roadwork. Confirm pitch before ordering: this track interchanges with the factory 86mm-pitch undercarriage on the T650 but is not the same as the 450x86x52.
Free shipping and a 2-year warranty on every rubber track — no freight surcharge at checkout.
Verified fitment for all Bobcat T650 serial numbers, covering serial prefixes A3P0, A3P1, ALJG, B5FF, and T1ML. Not sure which prefix your machine is? Find your serial plate with our Bobcat serial number lookup and match the first four characters.
Most operators replace tracks in pairs: running a new track opposite a worn one causes uneven loading that shortens the life of both. Order quantity 2 for a full set.

item.title: Toyota 16410-U2201-71 Radiator
item.description:
Aftermarket replacement equivalent to Toyota OEM part number 16410-U2201-71 (Radiator - Aluminum). Built for industrial forklift duty cycles without dealer markup.
Confirm fitment against your machine model and serial before ordering. Contact parts@flatearthequipment.com if you need help matching your plate.
1-year warranty. Freight calculated at checkout per order value.

item.title: ClipperCreek HCS-40 Level 2 EV Charging Station (Remanufactured) - 32A, 7.7kW
item.description:
Experience fast, reliable EV charging with this remanufactured ClipperCreek HCS-40 Level 2 charging station. This professional-grade 32A charger operates on 220-240V power to deliver 7.7kW charging capacity, making it perfect for home garages and commercial installations.
This Level 2 charging station provides up to 5 times faster charging than standard Level 1 chargers, delivering up to 25 miles of driving range per hour. The universal J1772 connector ensures compatibility with all electric vehicles, including Tesla models when used with an appropriate adapter.
Built for durability, this ClipperCreek charger features a NEMA 4-rated weatherproof enclosure suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. Advanced safety features include UL-listing with built-in overcurrent, overvoltage, and surge protection for secure charging operations.
The extended 25-foot charging cable provides exceptional flexibility for reaching different parking positions, while the hardwired installation ensures a secure and reliable connection. Whether you're upgrading from a basic Level 1 charger or installing dedicated EV charging infrastructure, this remanufactured ClipperCreek unit delivers professional performance with environmental responsibility.

item.description:
Replacement rubber track for JCB 190T ECO compact track loaders — 320mm wide, 86mm pitch, 50 links. The C-lug tread pattern delivers dependable traction in dirt, gravel, and mixed conditions.
Verified for JCB 190T ECO compact track loaders per vendor fitment catalog. Same 320×86×50 C-pattern track as the standard 190T listing — confirm size on your machine before ordering.
Free shipping and a 2-year warranty on every rubber track — no freight surcharge at checkout.
Most operators replace tracks in pairs: running a new track opposite a worn one causes uneven loading that shortens the life of both. Order quantity 2 for a full set.

item.title: Wallbox Pulsar Plus 40A Level 2 EV Charging Station (Remanufactured)
item.description:
Experience premium electric vehicle charging with this remanufactured Wallbox Pulsar Plus 40A Level 2 charging station. This compact yet high-performance charger combines space-efficient design with reliable 40-amp charging capability, delivering excellent charging speeds for residential and commercial applications.
This intelligent charging solution features seamless compatibility with all electric vehicles currently available, ensuring future-proof investment for any EV owner. The advanced Wallbox mobile application provides complete control over your charging sessions through intuitive WiFi and Bluetooth connectivity, enabling remote monitoring, scheduling, and energy management from any smart device.
Engineered for straightforward installation, this Pulsar Plus unit streamlines the setup process while maintaining professional-grade reliability. Smart charging technology optimizes power delivery and energy efficiency, making home EV charging both convenient and cost-effective.
Whether upgrading from basic charging solutions or establishing new EV infrastructure, this remanufactured Wallbox unit delivers cutting-edge performance with environmental sustainability. Professional refurbishment ensures reliable operation while supporting eco-friendly practices through equipment reuse.

item.title: ChargePoint Home Flex Level 2 EV Charger (Remanufactured) - 40A, 9.6kW
item.description:
Upgrade your electric vehicle charging experience with this remanufactured ChargePoint Home Flex Level 2 charging station. This 40-amp EV charger operates on 220-240V power to deliver an impressive 9.6kW charging capacity, making it an ideal solution for residential garages, workplace installations, and commercial properties.
This Level 2 charging station dramatically reduces charging time compared to standard 120V chargers, providing 25-30 miles of driving range per hour of charging. The universal J1772 connector ensures compatibility with virtually all electric vehicles, including Tesla models when used with an appropriate adapter.
Built for versatility, this ChargePoint charger features a weather-resistant NEMA 3R-rated enclosure suitable for both indoor and outdoor installations. Multiple safety systems protect against electrical issues, while smart connectivity enables remote monitoring and scheduling through the ChargePoint mobile application.
Professional hardwired installation ensures reliable performance and eliminates the hassle of plug-in connections. Whether you're upgrading from a basic Level 1 charger or installing your first dedicated EV charging solution, this remanufactured ChargePoint unit delivers professional-grade performance at exceptional value.

item.title: Wallbox Pulsar Plus 48A Level 2 EV Charging Station (Remanufactured)
item.description:
Experience premium electric vehicle charging with this remanufactured Wallbox Pulsar Plus 48A Level 2 charging station. This compact yet high-performance charger combines space-efficient design with robust 48-amp charging capability, delivering exceptional charging speeds for residential and light commercial applications.
This intelligent charging solution features seamless compatibility with all electric vehicles currently available, ensuring future-proof investment for any EV owner. The advanced Wallbox mobile application provides complete control over your charging sessions through intuitive WiFi and Bluetooth connectivity, enabling remote monitoring, scheduling, and energy management from any smart device.
Engineered for straightforward installation, this Pulsar Plus unit streamlines the setup process while maintaining professional-grade reliability. Smart charging technology optimizes power delivery and energy efficiency, making home EV charging both convenient and cost-effective.
Whether upgrading from basic charging solutions or establishing new EV infrastructure, this remanufactured Wallbox unit delivers cutting-edge performance with environmental sustainability. Professional refurbishment ensures reliable operation while supporting eco-friendly practices through equipment reuse.

item.title: Tesla Gen 3 Wall Connector Level 2 EV Charger - Remanufactured 48A
item.description:
Professional-grade Tesla Gen 3 Wall Connector Level 2 EV charging station delivering up to 11.5kW (48A) fast charging power for Tesla vehicles. This remanufactured EV charger provides up to 44 miles of range per hour - 6x faster than standard Level 1 chargers.
**Key Features:** • **Level 2 Fast Charging**: Up to 11.5kW power output (48A at 240V) for rapid charging • **Tesla Integration**: Designed exclusively for Tesla vehicles with seamless app connectivity • **Weather-Resistant**: NEMA 3R rated for indoor/outdoor installation (garages, driveways, commercial) • **Smart Charging**: Monitor and schedule charging through Tesla mobile app • **Extended Reach**: 24-foot cable length for flexible positioning • **Safety Certified**: cULus and UL Listed with overcurrent, overvoltage, and overheating protection
**Performance Specifications:** - Power Output: Up to 11.5kW (48A at 240V) - Charging Speed: 25-44 miles of range per hour - Connector: Tesla proprietary connector - Installation: Professional hardwired setup recommended - Cable Length: 24 feet for maximum flexibility
**Remanufactured Quality Assurance:** Each Tesla Gen 3 Wall Connector undergoes comprehensive remanufacturing with rigorous quality control. Every unit is restored, tested, and inspected to meet or exceed original Tesla specifications, ensuring dependable performance and long-term reliability.
**Perfect For:** - Tesla Model S, 3, X, Y owners - Home garage installations - Workplace charging stations - Commercial property EV infrastructure - Upgrade from Level 1 charging
Transform your Tesla charging experience with professional-grade Level 2 charging that delivers Tesla-optimized performance, smart connectivity, and weather-resistant durability for years of reliable service.

Key Features: • Large 10" x 6" reflective surface (67 sq. in.) • High-durability impact-resistant plastic construction • Universal clamp mount - fits arms up to 0.55" (14mm) diameter • E-approved safety glass for regulatory compliance • Direct replacement for JCB part number 331/63982 • Fast 1-2 day delivery in the continental USA

item.title: JCB 453/21300 Track Rod Assembly (Aftermarket)
item.description:
Heavy-duty aftermarket track rod assembly for JCB industrial equipment. This precision-engineered steering component is a direct replacement for JCB OEM part number 453/21300, designed to restore steering accuracy and stability to your machine.
⚠️ AVAILABILITY NOTE: Currently only one unit in stock. Please contact our parts team at (888) 392-9175 or via our contact form to confirm availability prior to placing your order.
Key Features: • Direct OEM replacement for JCB 453/21300 • Heavy-duty construction for demanding construction environments • Pre-assembled for faster installation and reduced downtime • Restores precise steering geometry and tire wear patterns • Ships with FREE FREIGHT to the continental US • Fast 1-2 day delivery available
Fits various JCB wheeled loaders and Loadall telehandlers. Ensure your machine's steering system is reliable with this high-quality aftermarket assembly.
Replaces OEM Part Number: 453/21300

item.title: New Holland 87535297 Bottom Track Roller (Aftermarket)
item.description:
Heavy-duty aftermarket bottom track roller for New Holland compact equipment. This high-performance undercarriage component is a direct replacement for New Holland OEM part number 87535297, precision-engineered for maximum durability and service life in extreme ground conditions.
Key Features: • Direct OEM replacement for New Holland part number 87535297 • Forged steel construction for superior strength and impact resistance • Precision-machined bearing surfaces for smooth rotation and reduced friction • High-quality internal seals to prevent contamination and leaks • Built to withstand demanding construction and landscape applications • Fast 1-2 day delivery available in the continental USA
Ensure your machine's track system maintains optimal tension and alignment with this professional-grade replacement roller.
Replaces OEM Part Number: 87535297

item.title: New Holland 144457A1 Tie Rod End (Aftermarket)
item.description:
High-quality aftermarket tie rod end for New Holland steering systems. This axial-type steering rod end is a precision-engineered replacement for New Holland OEM part number 144457A1, designed to restore smooth steering and accurate wheel alignment to your industrial equipment.
Key Features: • Direct OEM replacement for New Holland 144457A1 • Durable axial-type end design for long-lasting performance • Precision-machined M18 and M20 threads for perfect fitment • Integrated ball joint for responsive steering feedback • Built to withstand demanding construction and agricultural environments • Fast 1-2 day delivery in the continental USA
Ensure your machine's steering geometry is maintained with this professional-grade replacement component.
Replaces Part Number: 144457A1

item.title: JCB 1CXT Rubber Track 320x86x50 C Pattern
item.description:
Replacement rubber track for JCB 1CXT compact track loaders — 320mm wide, 86mm pitch, 50 links. The C-lug tread pattern is the all-around choice for dirt, gravel, and mixed-surface work on this hybrid mini CTL.
Verified for JCB 1CXT, 1CXT HF, 1CXT EC, and 1CXT HF EC per vendor fitment catalog. Same 320×86×50 C-pattern track as JCB 190T — not interchangeable with 150T (320×86×48). Confirm size on the track you are replacing before ordering. Find your serial plate with our JCB serial number lookup.
Free shipping and a 2-year warranty on every rubber track — no freight surcharge at checkout.
Most operators replace tracks in pairs: running a new track opposite a worn one causes uneven loading that shortens the life of both. Order quantity 2 for a full set.

item.title: Toyota 27060UB050 Alternator
item.description:
Aftermarket replacement equivalent to Toyota OEM part number 27060UB050 (Alternator - New). Built for industrial forklift duty cycles without dealer markup.
Confirm fitment against your machine model and serial before ordering. Contact parts@flatearthequipment.com if you need help matching your plate.
1-year warranty. Freight calculated at checkout per order value.

item.title: ACT Quantum 36VDC 480VAC Charger Module (Repair and Return)
item.description:
The ACT Quantum 36VDC Charger Module is a high-frequency power conversion unit built for industrial battery charging in demanding electric lift truck operations. It accepts 480VAC 3-Phase input and delivers a regulated 36VDC output for fast, stable battery cycling. Designed for 36V Class I and Class II electric forklift fleets running high-frequency charging schedules.
Direct cross-reference for OEM part number 81063658R — also sold as Hyster 81063658R, Hyster Unisource HU81063658R, Yale Premier YP81063658R, and Unisource 81063658R.
This is a Repair & Return service — send us your existing ACT Quantum module and our certified technicians will diagnose, repair, and bench-test it back to OEM specifications. Typical turnaround is 3–5 business days from receipt. No core charge required (you're sending in your own unit). Includes a 6-month warranty on the repair work and free return shipping.

item.title: Lithium Rhino 36V 65Ah LiFePO4 Golf Cart Conversion Kit (Battery + Charger + Accessories)
item.description:
The Lithium Rhino 36V 65Ah LiFePO4 Conversion Kit is a drop-in lithium upgrade engineered for 36V electric golf carts including EZGO TXT/RXV, Club Car DS/Precedent/Tempo, and Yamaha Drive/Drive2. Lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) chemistry delivers up to 50% more range, cuts cart weight by 60–70% versus lead-acid, and lasts 12+ years with zero watering or terminal maintenance.
This complete conversion bundle includes the Lithium Rhino battery, fast charger, DC-to-DC voltage converter, LCD touchscreen state-of-charge display, and full mounting hardware — everything required to retire your lead-acid pack in a single afternoon.
**Key Specs:** 6,000+ deep-cycle charge cycles · IP65 weatherproof rating · -4°F to 131°F operating range · 200A continuous / 500A peak discharge · Bluetooth app monitoring & anti-theft lockout · UN38.3 + MDSD certified · Up to 4 batteries parallel-connectable for fleet expansion.
**Warranty:** Industry-leading 8-year warranty (6 years complete coverage + 2 years pro-rated, $500 deductible). One of the longest warranties available on a golf cart lithium battery.
**Shipping:** Ground freight ships from US warehouse via HazMat-certified carrier (Class 9, UN3480). Bulk fleet orders of 3 or more batteries ship freight-free.
Direct equivalent to Flat Earth Equipment part number 113-LR38V65AH. Approximate weight: 49 lbs.
Full technical specification sheet: https://mzsozezflbhebykncbmr.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/lithium-rhino/lr3665.pdf
item.g:google_product_category: Vehicles & Parts > Vehicle Parts & Accessories > Vehicle Maintenance, Care & Decor > Vehicle Repair & Specialty Tools

item.title: Lithium Rhino 48V 105Ah Cube LiFePO4 Golf Cart Conversion Kit (Battery + Charger + Accessories)
item.description:
The Lithium Rhino 48V 105Ah LiFePO4 Conversion Kit is a drop-in lithium upgrade engineered for 48V electric golf carts including EZGO TXT/RXV, Club Car DS/Precedent/Tempo, and Yamaha Drive/Drive2. Lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) chemistry delivers up to 50% more range, cuts cart weight by 60–70% versus lead-acid, and lasts 12+ years with zero watering or terminal maintenance.
This complete conversion bundle includes the Lithium Rhino battery, fast charger, DC-to-DC voltage converter, LCD touchscreen state-of-charge display, and full mounting hardware — everything required to retire your lead-acid pack in a single afternoon.
**Cube form-factor variant**: Compact 14.1" × 13.3" × 10.8" footprint fits tight battery compartments where a standard rectangular pack won't clear. Same 105Ah capacity in a denser package.

item.title: Lithium Rhino 48V 120Ah Heated LiFePO4 Golf Cart Replacement Battery (Battery Only)
item.description:
The Lithium Rhino 48V 120Ah LiFePO4 Replacement Battery is a drop-in lithium upgrade engineered for 48V electric golf carts including EZGO TXT/RXV, Club Car DS/Precedent/Tempo, and Yamaha Drive/Drive2. Lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO4) chemistry delivers up to 50% more range, cuts cart weight by 60–70% versus lead-acid, and lasts 12+ years with zero watering or terminal maintenance.
Battery-only replacement for owners who already have a lithium-compatible charger and DC converter installed. Drop-in replacement uses the same mounting footprint as the original Lithium Rhino kit battery.
**Heated all-weather variant**: Built-in low-temperature heating element keeps cells in their optimal charge window down to -4°F, eliminating the cold-weather capacity loss that plagues unheated lithium packs. Ideal for northern climates, mountain communities, and any cart stored in unheated barns or garages.
**Key Specs:** 6,000+ deep-cycle charge cycles · IP65 weatherproof rating · -4°F to 131°F operating range · 200A continuous / 500A peak discharge · Bluetooth app monitoring & anti-theft lockout · UN38.3 + MDSD certified · Up to 4 batteries parallel-connectable for fleet expansion.
**Warranty:** Industry-leading 8-year warranty (6 years complete coverage + 2 years pro-rated, $500 deductible). One of the longest warranties available on a golf cart lithium battery.
**Shipping:** Ground freight ships from US warehouse via HazMat-certified carrier (Class 9, UN3480). Bulk fleet orders of 3 or more batteries ship freight-free.
Direct equivalent to Flat Earth Equipment part number 113-LR51V120AH-H. Approximate weight: 120 lbs.
Full technical specification sheet: https://mzsozezflbhebykncbmr.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/products/lithium-rhino/lr48120h.pdf

item.title: Bobcat T770 Rubber Track 450x86x55 C Pattern
item.description:
Replacement rubber track for the Bobcat T770 compact track loader in the standard 450mm width — 450mm wide, 86mm pitch, 55 links. The C-lug tread pattern is the all-around choice for dirt, gravel, and mixed-surface work.
Free shipping and a 2-year warranty on every rubber track — no freight surcharge at checkout.
Verified fitment for all Bobcat T770 serial numbers, covering serial prefixes AUYB, A3P9, A3P8. Not sure which prefix your machine is? Find your serial plate with our Bobcat serial number lookup and match the first four characters.
Most operators replace tracks in pairs: running a new track opposite a worn one causes uneven loading that shortens the life of both. Order quantity 2 for a full set.

Replacement rubber track for John Deere 331G compact track loaders — 450mm wide, 86mm pitch, 58 links. The zig-zag tread pattern offers aggressive multi-directional grip for soft ground, mud, and winter conditions.
Verified for John Deere 331G per vendor fitment catalog. Confirm width, pitch, and link count on the track you are replacing — the 450×86×56 multibar option uses 56 links and is not interchangeable with the 58-link C or zig-zag tracks.
Free shipping and a 2-year warranty on every rubber track — no freight surcharge at checkout.
Most operators replace tracks in pairs: running a new track opposite a worn one causes uneven loading that shortens the life of both. Order quantity 2 for a full set.

item.title: Mitsubishi 93051-10068 Lift Cylinder Seal Kit (Aftermarket)
item.description:
Aftermarket lift cylinder seal kit equivalent to Mitsubishi OEM part number 93051-10068. Rebuilds the main lift cylinder on Mitsubishi FGC20K, FGC25K, FDC20K, and FDC25K forklifts (and serial number ranges sharing the same cylinder family). The kit contains all O-rings, rod seals, wiper, piston seal, backup rings, snap rings, and miscellaneous wear components needed for a complete cylinder reseal.
Direct cross-reference for Caterpillar 93051-10068, CT93051-10068, DW93051-10068, MB93051-10068, and 9305110068. Mitsubishi and Caterpillar share many forklift cylinder assemblies under the MCFA (Mitsubishi-Caterpillar Forklift America) partnership — this seal kit fits both brand applications where the cylinder bore and rod diameters match the 40 × 50 mm specification.
Common installation use case: hydraulic fluid leaking past the lift cylinder rod, slow lift response, or visible weeping at the rod gland are all indicators of failed rod and piston seals. A full reseal with this kit restores rated lifting capacity and eliminates fluid loss for a fraction of the cost of replacing the entire cylinder assembly.
Includes installation-grade lubricant compatibility, anti-extrusion backup rings, and matched O-ring durometers to OEM specification. Install only on a properly cleaned cylinder bore — pitting or scoring will defeat new seals and should be honed or repaired before reassembly.
In stock and ships same business day when ordered before 3 PM EST. Backed by our 90-day return policy on unused parts.

item.title: Caterpillar 93051-22040 Lift Cylinder Assembly
item.description:
Aftermarket lift cylinder assembly equivalent to Caterpillar / Mitsubishi OEM part number 93051-22040 (also listed as 9305122040). Restores rated lifting capacity on MCFA-family forklifts that share this main lift cylinder platform under the Mitsubishi-Caterpillar partnership.
Cross-references include CT9305122040, MB9305122040, DW9305122040, and 9305122040. Confirm your machine model and serial number before ordering — cylinder port orientation and rod length can vary by production series.
Typical symptoms of a failed lift cylinder: slow lift, drift under load, external weeping at the rod gland, or scored rod/bore requiring assembly replacement rather than a seal kit alone. Pair with the matching lift cylinder seal kit when only seals are worn and the bore is in serviceable condition.
Ships as a heavy hydraulic component. Freight calculated at checkout. In stock for direct purchase; contact parts@flatearthequipment.com for fitment verification on your serial number.

item.title: JCB 320/08563 A/C Compressor
item.description: Aftermarket 24V Sanden SD7H15 air conditioning compressor for JCB excavators and heavy equipment. Replaces OEM part number 320/08563 (also cross-references 320/08573, Sanden 8202). 8-groove clutch, R134a refrigerant. Direct-fit replacement for JS220LC, JS200S, JS220LR, JS220S and TM-series telescopic handlers.

item.title: JCB 332/G0879 Aftermarket Vented Diesel Cap
item.description: Aftermarket vented diesel cap for JCB equipment. Replaces OEM part number 332/G0879 — built to fit the same application. Black ribbed screw-on cap with retention chain and hook. Match the part number on your existing cap or in the parts manual before ordering. In stock with same-day shipping.

item.title: JCB 32-925950 Fuel Filter
item.description: Aftermarket spin-on fuel filter for JCB industrial and construction equipment. Replaces OEM part number 32-925950 (also 32/925950). Helps protect the fuel system from dirt and water contamination.

item.title: JCB 32-925950 Economy Fuel Filter
item.description: Economy aftermarket spin-on fuel filter for JCB loaders and industrial equipment. Replaces OEM part number 32-925950 (also 32/925950). Budget-friendly option for routine service intervals.

item.title: JCB 159/69912 Aftermarket Wear Pad Assembly
item.description: Aftermarket wear pad assembly for JCB industrial and construction equipment. Replaces OEM part number 159/69912. Dense polymer wear pad with dual threaded mounting inserts. In stock with same-day shipping.

item.title: JCB 32-906503 Aftermarket 10 Micron Filter
item.description: Aftermarket 10-micron filter element for JCB industrial and construction equipment. Replaces OEM part number 32-906503. Specs: outer diameter 4.25 in, inner diameter 1.50 in, length 7.40 in, overall length 7.52 in. Same-day shipping on in-stock orders.

item.title: JCB 332/D2199 Aftermarket Twin Hose Assembly
item.description: Aftermarket twin hose assembly for JCB equipment. Replaces OEM part number 332/D2199 — built to fit the same application. Pair of 3/8" (DN10) 2-wire braid hydraulic hoses (SAE 100R16 / EN857 2SC class) with crimped fittings and yellow ID bands. Confirm the PN stamped on your existing hoses or in the parts manual before ordering. In stock with same-day shipping.

item.title: JCB 332/X6237 Aftermarket Left-Hand Joystick
item.description: Aftermarket left-hand joystick for JCB equipment. Replaces OEM part number 332/X6237 — built to fit the same application (LH SP 3-function style). Contoured grip with top-mounted switches, rubber dust boot, and dual harness connectors. Match the part number on your existing joystick or in the parts manual before ordering. In stock with same-day shipping.

item.title: JCB 400/H9799 Suspension Seat Assembly (Vinyl)
item.description:
Premium aftermarket suspension seat designed as a direct replacement for JCB equipment. This heavy-duty vinyl seat features mechanical stepless suspension for all-day operator comfort and reduced fatigue.
Key Features: • Durable black PVC vinyl upholstery - easy to clean and maintain • Mechanical stepless suspension system for smooth ride quality • Integrated seat belt with emergency locking retractor (right-hand side) • Weight adjustment for operator comfort customization • Slide rail system for fore/aft positioning • Document holder pocket for paperwork and manuals • Adjustable front-to-back positioning
Dimensions: • Overall Height: 29 inches • Overall Width: 21 inches (including mounting hardware) • Overall Length: 23 inches • Maximum Seat Height (at rest): 14 inches • Mounting Pattern: 6" x 7" (front-back x side-side)
This seat is built for demanding industrial applications and provides excellent value compared to OEM pricing. Ships with free freight to the continental US.
Replaces OEM Part Number: 400/H9799

item.title: JLG 91563158 Seat Assembly
item.description:
JLG 91563158 vinyl suspension seat assembly (GS12 platform). Fits JLG G10-43A, G10-55A, G10-55A ACCUPLACE, G12-55A, G12-55A ACCUPLACE, G6-42A, and G9-43A telehandlers.
Mechanical stepless suspension, slide rails, right-hand armrest, and seat belt provision. Approximately 24.5" H × 23.5" W × 23.5" D. Black PVC upholstery.
Replacement cushion pair: 7026900 (back) + 7026901 (bottom).
Verify OEM part number on your existing seat frame before ordering.

item.title: Caterpillar 298-8722 Seat Assembly
item.description:
Caterpillar 298-8722 vinyl suspension seat assembly (GS12 platform). Fits Cat TL1055, TL1055C, TL1255, TL642, TL943, and TL943C telehandlers.
Mechanical stepless suspension with slide rails and weight adjustment (110–286 lb capacity). Overall dimensions approximately 24.5" H × 23.5" W × 23.5" D. Black PVC upholstery with optional seat switch depending on cab configuration.
Includes seat adjusters. Replacement back/bottom cushion cross-references: order 304-2626 (back) or 299-0924 (bottom) if you only need cushions.
Confirm machine model and serial number before ordering — seat switch wiring and armrest configuration can vary by production year.
